prompt_text:
### Demographics: 37-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class III)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Liraglutide 1.8mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 96.7 kg; Height 168.4 cm; BMI 34.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 138/72 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.9%; 9 months ago 7.5%; 6 months ago 7.4%; 3 months ago 7.0%; current 7.2%), FPG (12 months ago 179mg/dL; 9 months ago 154mg/dL; 6 months ago 162mg/dL; 3 months ago 166mg/dL; current 182mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 97.2kg; 9 months ago 96.7kg; 6 months ago 93.3kg; 3 months ago 93.9kg; current 96.7kg), Height (12 months ago 168.4cm; 9 months ago 168.4cm; 6 months ago 168.4cm; 3 months ago 168.4cm; current 168.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 33.0kg/m²; current 34.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 133mmHg; 9 months ago 134mmHg; 6 months ago 139mmHg; 3 months ago 133mmHg; current 138mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 69mmHg; 9 months ago 71mmHg; 6 months ago 69mmHg; 3 months ago 69mmHg; current 72mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 21U/L; 9 months ago 15U/L; 6 months ago 24U/L; 3 months ago 15U/L; current 19U/L), AST (12 months ago 33U/L; 9 months ago 31U/L; 6 months ago 31U/L; 3 months ago 30U/L; current 28U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 51mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 53mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 53mL/min/1.73m²; current 51mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 153mg/g; 9 months ago 138mg/g; 6 months ago 165mg/g; 3 months ago 159mg/g; current 127mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 85mg/dL; 9 months ago 79mg/dL; 6 months ago 77mg/dL; 3 months ago 78mg/dL; current 81mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 41mg/dL; 9 months ago 44mg/dL; 6 months ago 44mg/dL; 3 months ago 44mg/dL; current 42mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 106mg/dL; 9 months ago 106mg/dL; 6 months ago 121mg/dL; 3 months ago 101mg/dL; current 112mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.8g/dL; 6 months ago 13.1g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 13.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
